news.title: Australia's ASX 200 Slips 0.15% to 8,828 as Mining Losses Offset Gains in Banks and Communication Stocks Today
news.description: The ASX 200 fell 0.15% as mining stocks offset gains in banking and communication services, despite a Wall Street rally. Global uncertainties, including Middle East tensions and China's GDP, influenced trading.
